description: An IRA holder held within an annuity has reached the age where they must begin taking RMDs.

nodes.task_description: Identify the contract holder and calculate their RMD for the year.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates the amount the customer must withdraw.

nodes.task_description: Notify the customer of their RMD amount and the deadline to take it.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a clear notification to the customer.

nodes.task_description: Process the RMD withdrawal as requested by the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully distributes the RMD amount.
